use_cases: Creating eye-catching neon-style headers for landing pages
Displaying decorative text with gas-tube lighting effects
Adding animated rainbow neon text for gaming or entertainment sites
Customizable branded text with preset color schemes
Interactive editable neon signage for digital displays
ai_summary: NeonText is a glowing text component with 13 preset color schemes inspired by noble gases and phosphor colors. Features include customizable text/border colors, intensity control, contentEditable support for interactive text, and animated rainbow effects. Uses CSS text-shadow and box-shadow for authentic neon tube lighting appearance.
